title: A Night At The Museum
description: An open world immersive experience through a museum after hours. Step inside Brighton Museum & Art Gallery like never before — after hours, the museum comes alive! Explore the galleries, encounter intriguing characters, uncover secret missions, and complete immersive challenges alongside your team. This is an open-world, large-scale theatrical experience — move freely through the museum, make your own choices, and play the game your way. Every corner hides a new twist, and every decision could change your outcome. Event Details: Duration: 4 hours Capacity: 175 participants Food & Drink: Available on-site at extra cost
